subject: Unexpected $18 charge on my Consumer Cellular bill
description:
Hello,

My December statement is $18 higher than usual and I can't tell what the extra line item is for. My plan hasn't changed. Could you look into the charge and let me know what it covers?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Weak cell signal at home in West Annapolis
description:
Hi,

Over the last couple of weeks I've been getting only one bar and dropped calls at my house in the West Annapolis area (21401). It was fine before. Is there a tower issue in the area, or is there a setting I should check on my iPhone?

Thanks,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Request to switch back to paper billing
description:
Hello,

I'd prefer to receive a printed paper bill by mail each month instead of only email. Could you please turn paper statements back on for my account? I'd still like the email copy as well.

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Internet down at 327 Munroe Court
description:
Hi,

My home internet went out this morning and hasn't come back. The Xfinity gateway shows a solid orange light. I've unplugged it for a minute and plugged it back in twice with no luck. Can you check for an outage in my area or send a signal to reset it?

Thanks,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Slow internet speeds in the evenings
description:
Hello,

Most evenings my internet slows to a crawl and streaming keeps buffering, even though I pay for the 400 Mbps plan. Speed tests during the day look fine. Is there something on my line or plan that would explain the slowdown?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Router replacement — old gateway keeps rebooting
description:
Hi,

The Xfinity gateway you sent me a few years ago has started rebooting on its own several times a day. It's clearly worn out. Can I get a replacement unit shipped, or should I swap it at the Annapolis store?

Thanks,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Help setting up my email on the iMac Mail app
description:
Hello,

I'm trying to add my Comcast email account to the Mail app on my iMac and it keeps saying the password is incorrect, though I'm sure it's right. Can you walk me through the correct server settings, or is there a separate app password I need?

Thank you,
Juan Hernandez

subject: Autopay didn't go through this month
description:
Hi,

I got a text saying my Consumer Cellular payment was declined, but the card on file is current. I don't want a late fee or a service interruption. Can you check what happened and let me pay it now?

Thanks,
Juan Hernandez
